# SU2 CLI availability oneshot

Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and at least verify its CLI contract when available.

## Why This Case Exists

Some important engineering tools are too heavyweight for default CI runners, but they still belong in the live suite so the product keeps pressure on realistic upstream surfaces.

## Case Shape

- ID: `su2_cli`
- Tier: `local_full`
- Style: `command`
- Workflow Slice: `aerodynamics`
- Target Kind: `command`
- Upstream Target: `SU2_CFD`
- Catalog Source: `challenges/cases/su2_cli/challenge.toml`

## Ingestion Breadth

This case relies on its smoke flow without extra breadth assertions.

## Run This Case

Use the convenience target:

```bash
make challenge CASE=su2_cli
```

Or call the runner directly:

```bash
PYTHONPATH=src .venv/bin/python scripts/run_challenges.py --catalog-dir challenges/cases --tier all --only su2_cli
```

## Fixtures

This case does not need checked-in fixtures.

## Smoke Flow

### 1. Probe the SU2 CLI help path

Tool: `run_su2_cfd`

Arguments:

```json
{
  "extra_argv": [
    "-h"
  ]
}
```

## What This Case Proves

- The challenge harness can represent heavyweight optional CLIs honestly.
- CLI ingestion can still produce a deterministic wrapper even for tools that are often only available on specialist machines.

## Known Limits

- This case intentionally degrades to `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.

## Challenge Definition

```toml
# Self-contained case: probe a heavyweight CFD CLI without overfitting to one machine.
# This case is allowed to skip cleanly when the upstream executable is not installed.
id = "su2_cli"
title = "SU2 CLI availability oneshot"
tier = "local_full"
style = "command"
slice = "aerodynamics"

[example]
summary = "Wrap the `SU2_CFD` executable and at least verify its CLI contract when available."
motivation = "Some important engineering tools are too heavyweight for default CI runners, but they still belong in the live suite so the product keeps pressure on realistic upstream surfaces."
proves = [
  "The challenge harness can represent heavyweight optional CLIs honestly.",
  "CLI ingestion can still produce a deterministic wrapper even for tools that are often only available on specialist machines.",
]
limitations = [
  "This case intentionally degrades to `skipped_unavailable` on machines without SU2 installed.",
]

[target]
kind = "command"
value = ["SU2_CFD"]

[probe]
commands = [["SU2_CFD"]]

[scaffold]
kind = "command"
function_name = "run_su2_cfd"
help_probe_args = ["-h"]

[smoke]
[[smoke.steps]]
label = "Probe the SU2 CLI help path"
tool = "run_su2_cfd"
arguments = { extra_argv = ["-h"] }
```
